title: Building AI Agents for Real-World Problems & Workflows
summary: IBM Technology outlines how AI agents operate in production systems with workflows, policies, and orchestration. The focus is on agent task coordination, rule enforcement, and alignment with human decision-making rather than introducing a specific new technique or tool.
writeup: IBM Technology explains how AI agents function inside production systems, covering workflows, policies, and orchestration rather than a single new technique or tool. The emphasis falls on how agents coordinate tasks, enforce rules, and stay aligned with human decision-making. Concepts touched include workflow automation and edge deployment. The takeaway is a framing of agents as components governed by policy and orchestration in real operational settings.
